summary: Tested 3 bug fixes: (1) Farewell products load without pet guard, (2) ProductCard MIRA expand row on all products, (3) MyRequestsPage Orders tab + subtitle. All 3 bugs confirmed FIXED.
verified_fixes: PASS Bug #1: FarewellMobilePage (/farewell) — products fetch without currentPet guard. 16 product cards (view-product-*) visible on page load. FarewellMobilePage useEffect at line 102-119 fetches regardless of currentPet, sets products=base when no pet is selected.

PASS Bug #2: ProductCard MIRA expand row — all 16 farewell product cards show '✦ MIRA' button (data-testid=mira-explains-*). productMiraTip fallback ('Made for Indie's breed') always computed so miraText is always truthy. Expand shows 'WHY MIRA PICKED THIS' section. Collapse on second click works (collapsed_count=0).

PASS Bug #3: MyRequestsPage (/my-requests) — subtitle says 'Your concierge requests & shop orders · Updates every 15 seconds'. TABS array includes {id:'orders', label:'Orders', icon:'🛍️'}. Orders tab is clickable, filter logic covers request_type='product_order', order_id present, category='shop', auto_created_from='cake_order'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from this session are fixed and verified via Playwright on 390px mobile viewport. Farewell page renders FarewellMobilePage on mobile (confirmed via data-testid=farewell-mobile). ProductCard MIRA expand tested on farewell page (16 cards, all with MIRA button). MyRequestsPage tested at /my-requests - Orders tab present with 🛍️ icon. Note: Dine/Celebrate mobile pages at 390px width do not render SharedProductCard components directly visible without scrolling (they show category strips first).
